execution_model: bundled final validation and handoff pass
scope_note: This pass completed the locally feasible testing, contract, and documentation work for the remaining iteration range. Items requiring staging infrastructure, production credentials, representative database traffic, or organizational approval remain explicitly blocked or open.

findings.title: Critical FastAPI and N8N service contracts were not enforced by tests
evidence: No OpenAPI route-presence tests existed for Scouting AI compute endpoints
No OpenAPI route/schema tests existed for Academy Ranking AI endpoint
No registry invariant tests existed for enabled N8N services
findings.root_cause: Service-boundary contracts were documented but not protected by automated checks
findings.recommended_follow_up: Export signed OpenAPI artifacts during CI and compare client SDK generation in a later pass

findings.title: Chatbot service-detection test returned a tuple instead of asserting results
evidence: After converting the result to an assertion, 8 of 17 cases failed due to extra workflow matches
findings.root_cause: The test printed failures but did not fail pytest; fuzzy matching accepted overly generic keywords
findings.recommended_follow_up: Add a shared matcher package or generated matcher test corpus so chatbot and N8N cannot drift

findings.title: Final staging and disaster-recovery validation process was not captured as executable handoff guidance
evidence: Existing runbooks did not include staging validation exit criteria or restore procedure
findings.root_cause: Earlier passes prioritized code and local gates over operational handoff
findings.recommended_follow_up: Rehearse the plan in staging and convert repeated manual checks into automated smoke tests

fixes_implemented.title: Add service-boundary contract tests
changes: Protected Scouting AI health and compute routes through OpenAPI checks
Protected Academy Ranking health and scoring route/schema refs
Protected N8N enabled-service registry invariants and required service IDs
Documented the contract gate and CI behavior

fixes_implemented.title: Make chatbot service detection assertive and reduce false-positive workflow routing
changes: Converted printed chatbot service-detection failures into pytest assertions
Suppressed overly generic single-word keyword matches
Applied consistent matcher behavior to the N8N-side service matcher

fixes_implemented.title: Complete final validation and handoff documentation
changes: Added staging validation sequence and exit criteria
Added disaster recovery and rollback procedure
Added final production readiness report with remaining no-go items

fixes_implemented.title: Reduce pytest cache noise in local and CI gates
changes: Added pytest cacheprovider suppression to local and CI Python test commands
Set PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE in local hardening runner

fixes_implemented.title: Replace deprecated Scouting AI startup hook with FastAPI lifespan handler
changes: Moved SQLite directory preparation and table initialization into a FastAPI lifespan handler

passed.result: Maven test gate passed inside the full runner
Bandit report has 0 findings for scanned Python app/service directories
pip-audit found no known vulnerabilities in audited direct requirement files

commands: cd scouting-ai-service && python -m pytest tests -v -p no:cacheprovider
cd academy-ranking-ai-service && python -m pytest tests -v -p no:cacheprovider
cd n8n-service-orchestration && python -m pytest tests -v -p no:cacheprovider
cd chatbot/chatbot && python -m pytest apps/chat/tests -v -p no:cacheprovider
known_warnings: pip-audit warns that --no-deps direct audits should be replaced with hashed lockfiles for release-grade scanning
Bandit warns about existing nosec B105 annotations in scouting-ai-service/app/api/routes/auth.py, but the current Bandit JSON contains 0 findings

remaining_no_go_items: Full observability implementation and alert validation
Staging database profiling and index validation
Load, stress, soak, and chaos tests against production-like infrastructure
Java/Flutter transitive CVE gates and release SBOM generation
Disaster recovery restore and rollback rehearsal in staging
convergence_status: Locally feasible iteration scope completed. The platform is not production-certified; it is ready for a staging validation sprint with explicit remaining blockers.
